name: academorix/platform-sdk
purpose: Typed Saloon SDK for the Platform service — applications, tenants, organizations, regions, branches, settings, branding, domains, storage. Umbrella client built on api-sdk.
capabilities: Aggregates the per-module resource SDKs at boot
when_to_use: A consumer service that needs to read or mutate platform aggregates cross-service under one client.
when_not_to_use: For the identity or billing surfaces, use the granular sibling SDKs (identity-sdk, billing-sdk) instead.
